free_text: Eng.transl.of IZV,37,1019,1973
Only graphs are given
Effect of nuclear deformation on total neutron
cross-sections
No information available
method described.
The basic material was in the form of oxides which were
converted into stable fluorides under strictly
identical conditions. 10 g of the oxide of the
rare-earth element were mixed in a teflon container
with 25 ml water, and 15 ml of nitric acid were added
in small portions to the suspension.
Deformation parameter was obtained to be :
Given error consists of
statistical measurement error and other errors
connected with sample inhomogenity ,angle uncertainty
of neutron beam direction and others
